name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual matching causes discrepancies in financial records. We automate the extraction and matching process instead of manual matching of invoices to purchase orders.
problem_solved: Difficulty in matching invoice line items to purchase orders accurately.
features: basic matching algorithm for line items
